creator: adridg@freebsd.org
text:
It would be really useful to have a minimal example of this. For instance, with this C file:

```
int main()
{
        return 0;
}
```

and, for instance, this CMakeLists.txt:

```
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.14...3.20)
project(example VERSION 0.0.0 LANGUAGES C)
add_executable(hello main.c)
```

What do I need to do -- install ports, set environment variables -- to demonstrate the problem? Perhaps it needs a simple ports makefile as well, so that the relevant USE-bits can do their thing and cause problems.
